author: lemifn
description: In response to declining birth rates and shrinking student populations, some rural schools in South Korea have enrolled elderly women-particularly grandmothers who never had the opportunity to learn to read or write-to keep their classrooms open. For example, Bangrim Primary School in Gangwon Province, which once had nearly 700 students, saw its enrollment drop to just 22. To prevent closure, the school began admitting elderly women like 72-year-old Park Go-ee, who now attends classes alongside much younger students to learn the literacy skills she missed earlier in life. This initiative not only helps sustain rural schools but also offers lifelong learning opportunities for seniors, enhancing their social inclusion and mental well-being. Studies have shown that literacy education for rural seniors in South Korea is positively linked to greater social inclusion and improved mental health. As South Korea continues to grapple with one of the world's lowest fertility rates, such innovative approaches serve a dual purpose: preserving educational institutions in rural areas and empowering elderly citizens through education. #fyp #blowup #story #school

author: nypost
description: The New Jersey train conductor just busted for allegedly horribly abusing a girl for years had been hailed for job heroics in February, it emerged вАФ along with new details about her escape. Branndon Mosley, 41, was heralded for his actions during a Feb. 6 SEPTA train fire вАФ weeks before he and his girlfriend were charged May 11 with confining and abusing the girl, who was 11 when the torture started and is now 18, according to a report. The child was forced to live in a dog crate for a year and at one point had only a bucket for a toilet in the coupleвАЩs вАЬsqualidвАЭ animal-filled home, Camden County prosecutors said. The girlвАЩs relationship to the pair was not immediately known. Mosley and gal pal Brenda Spencer, 38, both of Gloucester Township are accused of physically and mentally abusing the girl before she finally escaped to the house of a neighbor who helped get her to safety. Mosley also is accused of sexually abusing the child. вАЬShe told me just recently that they cut her hair and shaved her head for punishment,вАЭ the neighbor who helped rescue the child told Fox 29. вАЬShe said they kept her in the dog crate. It was horrific, it was disgraceful,вАЭ said the resident, who only wanted to go by Susan. вАЬWe were both in tears, me and my son. We couldnвАЩt believe it.вАЭ The sickening allegations surfaced just weeks after Mosley jumped into action when a train traveling from west Trenton, NJ, to Newark, Del., caught on fire near the Crum Lynne Station in Pennsylvania in February, Fox 29 reported. All 325 passengers and four crew members on board evacuated safely, officials said. Mosley was honored by SEPTA for his actions in the incident, with Fox 29 obtaining a photo of the emotionless conductor holding up a framed certificate. SEPTA did not immediately return an email or call seeking comment. The alleged abuser has been with the transit agency for 18 years and has since been taken off duty, a SEPTA spokesperson told the station. Mosley and Spencer were charged with first-degree kidnapping, second-degree aggravated assault, aggravated assault with a deadly weapon and a slew of other criminal counts. Mosley is also separately facing charges of first-degree aggravated sexual assault and second-degree sexual assault, prosecutors said. вАЬI donвАЩt know what to think because you know the people next door. You talk to them, you never know whatвАЩs happening in there,вАЭ the neighbor, Susan, told the station. вАЬIt is so unreal to me to know what was happening right next door to me.вАЭ рЯУЄ: SEPTA; Camden County Prosecutor's Office

author: epicuriousexpeditions
description: Replying to @bwhyte.1 Chicken Tikka Masala  2-3 lbs boneless chicken, cut into chunks Marinade 1/2 cup plain yogurt 1 tbs lemon juice  1вАЭ ginger, grated 4 cloves garlic 2 tbs cilantro 1 tbs cumin seed 1 tbs coriander seed 1 tsp garam masala  1 tsp chili powder  2 tsp paprika  1/2 tsp cayenne pepper 1 tsp turmeric 1/16 tsp ground cloves 1/4 tsp ground black pepper 1/8 tsp cardamom  1/8 tsp cinnamon  1 1/2 tsp kosher salt  Masala Sauce 3 tbs salted butter  1 medium onion,  chopped 1 large red bell pepper, chopped 3 cloves garlic  1/2 cup golden raisins 1 14oz can diced tomatoes  1/16 tsp ground cloves 1/8 tsp black pepper 2 tsp garam masala 1/8 tsp cardamon 1/2 tsp ground cumin  1/8 tsp cayenne pepper 1/8 tsp cinnamon 1/2 tsp kosher salt  3/4 cup heavy whipping cream  Indian Aromatic Rice 		 2 ¬†tbs vegetable oil 1 cinnamon stick  ¬† 1/8 tsp cardamom 1/8 tsp ground cloves ¬† 1 ¬†tbs cumin seed 1 ¬†tsp kosher salt  1 1/2¬†cups¬†rice  2 1/4 cups water 1. Toast cumin seed and coriander seed in a skillet over medium heat until fragrant and lightly browned. Place cumin seed and coriander seed in blender or spice grinder and grind into a powder. Add remaining marinade ingredients to blender and blend until smooth. Pour marinade over clean chicken and toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.  2. In a large dutch oven, sear the marinated chicken until lightly golden on both sides. Sear in batches to avoid overcrowding the pan. Remove seared chicken.  3. Add butter to the dutch oven and deglaze the pan. Add onions and saut√© for 3 minutes. Add bell peppers and saut√© for 3 additional minutes. Add garlic and saut√© for 2 additional minutes. Add raisins and saut√© for an additional minute. Add tomatoes and spices and saut√© for 5 additional minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool until it can be safely transferred to a blender.  4. Start on the aromatic rice by pouring oil into a small saucepan over medium heat. Add cinnamon stick, cardamom, cloves, cumin seed, and salt. Cook for about 3 minutes or until aromatic and lightly browned. Add rice and toast for an additional 2 minutes. Add water and bring to a boil. Cover and reduce heat to low for 20 minutes. Remove from heat and leave covered until ready to serve. Fluff with fork.  5. Transfer to a blender and blend until smooth. Return to dutch oven over medium heat. Add heavy whipping cream and stir until smooth. Return chicken to dutch oven and stir gently to coat in sauce. Cover and reduce heat to low. Cook an additional 20 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through. 6. Serve with aromatic rice.  #britishfood #indianfood #chickentikkamasala #recipe #fyp

author: akya.broo
description: Yoichi Isagi (жљФгБДгБХгБОдЄЦгВИдЄАгБДгБ°, Isagi Yoichi?) is the main protagonist of the Blue Lock series. Isagi is a second-year high school student from Saitama who initially played as a forward in high school. Unlike his fellow competitors, who were scouted by Anri Teieri, Isagi was chosen personally by Jinpachi Ego himself after seeing him play. Isagi's main goal is to become the world's best striker. After surviving the many trials and tribulations of Blue Lock, Isagi is ranked #1 in the program alongside Rin Itoshi and is seen as one of the most exciting talents in football with an offer from Bastard M√Љnchen at the end of the Neo Egoist League. Isagi is a player who is wholeheartedly focused on being the best player on the field in every game. He doesn't care if he has to do things himself, urge his teammates to help him, take advantage of the ever-shifting feelings and emotions on the field, or completely set aside his pride and emotions to be a logical and efficient football machine that exists solely to win, ideally by scoring goals. Following the end of the Neo Egoist League, Isagi has qualified to become one of the 23 players for the new Japan U-20 team entering the upcoming PIFA U-20 World Cup. Isagi is a teenager of slightly above average height and slim build, developing a stronger, more defined-looking physique. He has short, dark blue hair that leaves a V-shaped fringe between his deep blue eyes, along with a plant shaped ahoge at the top of his head. While attending Ichinan High School, he wore an unbuttoned blazer over a white undershirt and striped tie. Both the Ichinan High jersey and gym uniform are light-colored with black stripes. At Blue Lock, Isagi wears the standard-issued body suit (black with blue stripes) and tracksuit. During the First Selection, he wore Team Z's blue #11 jersey and Team Z's gray-capped cleats. During Second Selection, he wore Team White's #15 jersey and later switched to red. He then later switched to Team A's black #15 jersey during the Blue Lock Eleven tryouts. Isagi dons an official blue-colored Blue Lock player uniform with the #11 , that looks very similar to the ones seen in the first cover spread minus the Japan flag during the Japan U-20 match. As a regular for Team Germany, Isagi wears the red and black with gold stripes Bastard M√Љnchen uniform as #11  #life #pyf #fyp #real #mylife #isagiyoichi #egoista #isagi #hiori #hioriyo #bestfriend #bluelock #we

author: simply_sand
description: IвАЩve been seeing more and more people start weight loss meds literally weeks after giving birth and honestly, it breaks my heart a little. Because somewhere along the way, we started believing that our bodies need to snap back immediately after bringing a whole human into the world. Like thereвАЩs something wrong with taking time to heal. Like softness, stretch marks, or a bigger size means failure. And I get it the pressure is everywhere. Social media floods us with вАЬbounce backвАЭ culture. Before and after photos. Moms who вАЬlost the baby weightвАЭ in a month. And youвАЩre sitting there in mesh underwear, leaking from everywhere, wondering whatвАЩs wrong with you. But let me say this loud: You donвАЩt need Ozempic you just had a baby. You need rest. Nourishment. Patience. Compassion. You need time to feel like you again and that has nothing to do with a scale. Your body isnвАЩt behind. ItвАЩs not broken. ItвАЩs healing, adjusting, protecting you, and taking care of your baby  even if it doesnвАЩt look like it used to. And that is more than enough. So if youвАЩre feeling like youвАЩre the only one not rushing to lose weight  youвАЩre not. YouвАЩre human. YouвАЩre healing. And youвАЩre doing amazing. #tiktokhypemoms #simplysand #postpartumjourney #postpartumbody

author: nypost
description: This one's for you, new grads. рЯОУ The best cities to start your career have been ranked by WalletHub, using over two dozen metrics ranging from job growth rate and starting salary averages to average commute and housing affordability. вАЬThe best cities for starting a career not only have a lot of job opportunities but also provide substantial income growth potential and satisfying work conditions,вАЭ WalletHub analyst Chip Lupo said. вАЬItвАЩs also important to consider factors such as how fun a city is to live in or how good of a place it is for raising a family, to ensure life satisfaction outside of your career.вАЭ The release of the report comes as graduation season is in full swing вАУ a time when many people are figuring out where in the country they want to kick off their professional lives. The five cities that WalletHub found to be most favorable for beginning a career were located in three different states. The cities of Charleston, South Carolina; Richmond, Virginia; Salt Lake City, Utah; Columbia, South Carolina; and Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, are ranked No. 6 through 10, respectively. Of the 182 locales included in WalletHubвАЩs report, the ones with the lowest overall scores for beginning a career were Detroit, Michigan; New York, New York; Oxnard, California; Bridgeport, Connecticut; and Pearl City, Hawaii.  рЯУЄ: Getty; AP; Kevin Ruck - stock.adobe.com

author: velcheva.vibe
description: вЦОBrioche Sandwich with Sous Vide Steak Rib Section (or Choice of Meat): 1. Ingredients      вАҐ 1.2 kg rib section on the bone      вАҐ 2 1/2 sprigs of herbs   2. Place the meat in a vacuum bag, add the herbs, and cook the meat sous vide for 1.5 hours at 57¬∞C. Tangzhong: 1. Ingredients      вАҐ 100 g water      вАҐ 30 g flour   2. Mix everything together and place in a small saucepan over medium heat.   3. Stir constantly until the mixture thickens into a sticky paste.   4. Remove from heat and let it cool.   5. Continue with the following steps. Egg Mixture: 1. Ingredients      вАҐ 1 egg      вАҐ A little water      вАҐ A pinch of flake salt   2. Combine everything and whisk or mix until smooth.   3. Cover and refrigerate until needed. Buns: 1. Ingredients      вАҐ 2 eggs      вАҐ 130 g water      вАҐ 160 g unsalted butter, cubed and cold      вАҐ 8 g dry yeast      вАҐ 470 g flour      вАҐ Prepared tangzhong      вАҐ 65 g potato starch      вАҐ 35 g skimmed milk powder      вАҐ 8 g sea salt      вАҐ 85 g granulated sugar      вАҐ Prepared egg mixture   2. In a bowl, mix the dry yeast, water, and skimmed milk powder, whisking until fully dissolved. Let it sit for 5 minutes.   3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, potato starch, salt, and sugar until homogeneous.   4. Add the yeast mixture, butter, tangzhong, and eggs to the dry ingredients.   5. Mix until a uniform dough forms, then continue kneading until the dough passes the windowpane test (about 10-12 minutes on high speed using a mixer).   6. Cover the dough with a towel or plastic wrap and let it rise for 1.5 hours or until doubled in size.   7. After rising, deflate the dough and divide it into desired portions.   8. Shape each portion by folding the edges inward, turning it over, and forming tight balls or buns with a smooth surface.   9. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.   10. Let it rest for another 2 hours until the dough doubles in size again.   11. Preheat the oven to 165¬∞C.   12. Brush with the egg mixture and bake for 12-18 minutes or until cooked through. Pear Vanilla Jam: 1. Ingredients      вАҐ 2 pears, peeled, cored, and diced      вАҐ Corresponding amount of sugar for jam (1:1 ratio)      вАҐ 1 vanilla bean, split and seeds extracted      вАҐ 1-2 sprigs of thyme      вАҐ A piece of butter      вАҐ White wine vinegar (for seasoning)      вАҐ Flake salt (for seasoning)   2. Puree the pears into a smooth paste and weigh the total amount.   3. Add the pear puree, jam sugar (equal amount to pear puree), vanilla bean, seeds, and thyme to a saucepan.   4. Cook according to the instructions on the jam sugar package (usually about 4 minutes at boiling).   5. Add a piece of butter, a little white vinegar, and a pinch of flake salt.   6. Allow to cool completely.   7. Whip again until smooth and light in texture.   8. Transfer to an oil jar (or container) and refrigerate until needed. Truffle Mayonnaise: 1. Ingredients      вАҐ 250 g oil      вАҐ 2 egg yolks      вАҐ 1 tsp Dijon mustard      вАҐ 1 tsp lemon juice      вАҐ 1/2 tsp granulated sugar      вАҐ 16 g summer truffle, finely grated      вАҐ White wine vinegar (for seasoning)   2. Whisk together the egg yolks, mustard, lemon juice, and sugar.   3. Gradually add the oil while continuously whisking to emulsify (a blender can also be used).   4. Once emulsified, season with white wine vinegar, flake salt, and freshly grated truffle. Garnishes and Final Touches: 1. Ingredients      вАҐ Prepared brioche buns      вАҐ Prepared sous vide steak      вАҐ Prepared truffle mayonnaise      вАҐ Prepared pear vanilla jam      вАҐ 100-200 g arugula      вАҐ Olive oil      вАҐ 100 g Parmesan cheese, thinly sliced      вАҐ 12-20 g summer truffle, thinly sliced   2. In a large skillet, add olive oil and sear the sous vide steak on both sides.   3. Slice the buns. 4. After resting, slice the steak to your desired thickness and season with black pepper and salt. #foodaesthetic #aestheticcooking #reinavelcheva #byvelcheva #diffusers #velasaromaticas #foodtutorial
hashtags: foodaesthetic, aestheticcooking, reinavelcheva, byvelcheva, diffusers, velasaromaticas, foodtutorial

author: thegentryfarm
description: We offer full weekend rentals for weddings. We believe this provides the best option to allow you to have the rehearsal, rehearsal dinner, and decorating on Friday, the wedding on Saturday, and cleanup on Sunday. Our current cost for 2026 weddings is $6,500.00 for the weekend which will begin from Friday at 9:00am through Sunday at 12:00pm. Sales tax will be added to all rentals. Luckily, all we require to reserve your requested date is a $1,000.00 deposit that is deducted from the total cost of the venue. We take cash, checks, debit and credit cards - Visa, Mastercard, Discover, or American Express. All balances must be paid in full 60 days before your event, however, we allow you to make payments at any time for however much you desire! Once you book, we allow you to use the facility for engagement pictures or bridal portraits.  The following amenities are included in the barn rental listed by the area they are located:  Chapel:  Stained Glass Windows  LED Candles  Dimmed Lighting Capacity: 180 guests seated for ceremony.  Saloon:  Convection Oven Four Eye Stove Two Cocktail Refrigerators Wine Cooler Dishwasher Sink 10 - Bar Stools 9 - Saddle Stools 4 - Cocktail Tables TV with DVD Player Surround System Corral:  WomenвАЩs Restroom Shower MenвАЩs Restroom Full Size Refrigerator  Storage Closet 2 - Large opening barn doors into grassy open fields. Most used for wedding ceremonies.   Patio or Elongated Decking Area: 15 - 5вАЩ X 6вАЩ Picnic Tables ; Seats 96 people if 6 per table  Firepit  Adjoining Cemented Shelter (Dance Floor) ; Capacity: 250 guests seated for ceremony.  Vintage Beverage Wagon Corn Hole Game Also Included:  20 - 5вАЩ Round Banquet Tables 5 - 8вАЩ Rectangle Serving Tables 155 - White Padded Folding Chairs Engagement Photography Sessions Bridal Portraits  Meetings with selected vendors Paper Towels Bathroom Tissue Trashbags  Hand Soaps  Trash Cans Propane Heaters at an additional $35 charge each to use - we provide propane tanks Firewood The Gentry Barn is 6,500 square feet and sits on approximately 260 beautiful acres. This heaven sent property also hosts a home for The Gentry Cabin, longhorns, horses, geese, and crops. We also have a large area for parking which has street light posts for nightly lighting.  The Gentry FarmвАЩs quaint cabin includes 1 king bed, 1 bathroom with a shower, a kitchen area with a full size refrigerator, dining area, and a den. The Cabin makes for the picture perfect scenery for the bridal suite during the get ready process. The cabin is on the same property for $450.00 for the weekend, Friday from 9:00am through Sunday at 12:00pm. There is a surround sound system located in the barn with individual room controls. We are handicap accessible, with a removable ramp available upon request. You would be responsible for putting up tables and chairs, moving items back in place, and removing trash at the end of the event. Items on the floor in the barn may be moved as needed during the event, however, all items on the wall must remain. (434) 483-0232 | thegentryfarm.com

author: ketorecipes
description: Watermelon Feta Salad рЯНЙ  This might just be the fruit salad of the summer and a perfect addition to the spread this Memorial Day Weekend. ItвАЩs crunchy, sweet, sweet and refreshing - a TRUE mouth party and SO good. The combination of watermelon, feta, mint is a classic and amazing on itвАЩs own, but when you add berries, lime, and pistachios into the mix it takes this salad to to a whole new level.  You own the ratios here, so feel free to modify this however way you want based on your own taste buds. Here is how I made it (this makes a large, party-sized salad) 1.First, start with a big base of watermelon chunks - I like to make these in smaller chunks, about 1/4 inch cubes. I went with about 4-5 cups of cubed watermelon. 2.Add 4oz of blueberries and 4oz of raspberries to the mix. 3.Add 1/3 cup fresh chopped mint. 4.Add the zest of 1 large lime and squeeze the juice over the watermelon. 5.Add 4-5 ounces of feta over the top. 6. Add two tablespoons of the highest quality olive oil you have. 7.Add a couple small pinches of sea salt (dont go overboard since feta is quite salty) 9.Add a tablespoon or so of chile lime seasoning or tajin. 10.Toss well, and right before serving, add 1/3 to 1/2 cup of freshly toasted pistachios. 11.Give everything a really good mix, gently so as to not crush the watermelon, then give it a taste and modify as needed. This is best served IMMEDIATELY (and even better outside in the sunshine рЯШО)  ENJOY!! #lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #watermelonsalad #fruitsalad #healthyrecipes #healthyfoodshare #goodmoodfood #saladrecipe
hashtags: lowcarb, lowcarbrecipes, watermelonsalad, fruitsalad, healthyrecipes, healthyfoodshare, goodmoodfood, saladrecipe

author: thesadefamily
description: Who was drafted by the Yanks?  The game is called over the line. Got to hit the ball on the fly over the line, if it lands over the line and in fair territory without the fielders catching it, itвАЩs a hit. If itвАЩs caught or doesnвАЩt carry the line, itвАЩs an out. If you hit a foul ball you get one more try. Once you get 2 hits in an inning, every hit after that is a run. A home run is anything past the last fielder wherever they are. Home runs clear the вАЬbasesвАЭ scoring a run for each plus the batter. You can pitch from wherever you want, and however you want. Most beginners pitch softtoss and swing like baseball. Advanced players have more of a golf/cricket swing to hit the corners. We use an official otl ball made by debeer (or a 16 inch clincher if playing on grass), and wooden softball bats (or metal is playing on grass). The field is 55ft from from the plate, and 55 ft wide. Sidelines extend forever. This year will be the 73nd annual world championship, where hundreds of teams compete over two weekends in July at fiesta island, San Diego. The tournament is two weekends long. ItвАЩs famous for its out of pocket team names and party atmosphere. In this game people swing like golf or cricket because A ground ball is an auto out, pop flies are easy outs. Batting like this allows you to hit low line drives in each corner. All top players hit like this. Most also take a вАЬhomerunвАЭ pitch, which they will swing baseball style, if they feel they can hit it past where the last defender is playing (the last defender is the вАЬfenceвАЭ for a homerun). #baseball #baseballtiktoks #baseballboys #softball #overtheline #otl

author: parttimeadventuring
description: Welcome to one of the quietest places in the United States вАФ the Hoh Rainforest in Olympic National Park.  Tucked away in WashingtonвАЩs Olympic Peninsula, this temperate rainforest is not only known for its lush moss-covered trees and misty trails вАФ itвАЩs also renowned for its natural silence. The thick canopy and dense vegetation actually dampen sound, creating a peaceful hush thatвАЩs hard to find anywhere else. This is where you come to hear nothing but nature вАФ the soft patter of rain, the rustle of ferns, and maybe the distant call of a bird. ItвАЩs home to the famous вАЬOne Square Inch of SilenceвАЭ project, a spot designated to preserve natural quiet. рЯУНDon't miss the Hall of Mosses Trail for an easy walk through an enchanted green world that feels like stepping into another realm. If youвАЩre looking for stillness, solitude, and a sensory reset, Hoh Rainforest should be high on your list. Have you ever experienced a place this quiet? #HohRainforest #OlympicNationalPark #UnderratedNationalParks #RainforestVibes #OneSquareInchOfSilence #NationalParkAdventure #FindYourPark

author: richardakers27
description: Ozzy Osbourne, born John Michael Osbourne on December 3, 1948, in Birmingham, England, is a pioneering figure in heavy metal music, renowned for his distinctive voice, charismatic stage presence, and tumultuous career. Often referred to as the "Prince of Darkness," Osbourne has had a profound influence on rock music and popular culture, both as the frontman of Black Sabbath and as a solo artist. Osbourne's early life was marked by economic hardship and a rebellious spirit. Growing up in a working-class family in Birmingham, he faced numerous challenges, including a troubled academic career and a series of odd jobs. His passion for music emerged during his teenage years, and he eventually joined the band Earth, which would later become Black Sabbath. In 1968, Black Sabbath was formed with Osbourne as the lead vocalist, alongside guitarist Tony Iommi, bassist Geezer Butler, and drummer Bill Ward. The band's self-titled debut album, released in 1970, is often credited with pioneering heavy metal music. Black Sabbath's dark, heavy sound and Osbourne's distinctive voice set the stage for a new genre and influenced countless bands that followed. Black Sabbath's 1970 release, "Paranoid," further cemented their place in rock history with iconic tracks like "Iron Man," "War Pigs," and the title track "Paranoid." The album's success solidified Osbourne's reputation as a leading figure in the heavy metal genre. His theatrical stage presence and powerful vocals became defining characteristics of the band's performances. Despite the band's success, Osbourne's tenure with Black Sabbath was marked by internal conflicts and his own struggles with substance abuse. The pressures of fame and the lifestyle associated with it took a toll on Osbourne, leading to his departure from the band in 1979. His departure was a significant turning point, both for him and for Black Sabbath, who continued to have success with different lineups. In 1980, Ozzy Osbourne launched his solo career with the release of "Blizzard of Ozz," an album that introduced a new chapter in his career. The album featured hit songs like "Crazy Train" and "Mr. Crowley," showcasing Osbourne's ability to blend melodic elements with his heavy metal roots. The success of the album marked the beginning of Osbourne's successful solo career and established him as a major force in rock music. Osbourne's solo career continued to thrive throughout the 1980s and 1990s with a series of successful albums, including "Diary of a Madman" (1981) and "No More Tears" (1991). His music during this period maintained his heavy metal edge while also exploring new themes and styles. Hits like "Mama, I'm Coming Home" and "No More Tears" became staples of his live performances. Despite ongoing health issues and various personal challenges, including his battle with Parkinson's disease, Osbourne has continued to tour and record new music. His influence on heavy metal and rock music remains significant, and his contributions to the genre have been recognized with numerous awards and honors. Ozzy Osbourne's impact on music and culture is profound. He is often credited with shaping the sound of heavy metal and influencing countless artists who have followed in his footsteps. His career, marked by both remarkable achievements and notable controversies, has established him as one of rock's most enduring and iconic figures. Overall, Ozzy Osbourne's legacy is characterized by his innovative approach to heavy metal, his larger-than-life persona, and his ability to connect with audiences through his music and performances. author: alswithsalym
description: It sounds strange, maybe even morbid. But living with ALS means facing things most people never have to think about like what photo will be used when IвАЩm gone. Recently ish took mine last November  ThereвАЩs a peace in it. ItвАЩs the photo I chose. Not one picked in a rush, not a random old memory. ItвАЩs me, now, present, real. It means my loved ones wonвАЩt have to make that choice through tears. But it also broke my heart as I silently smiled through the tears I was swallowing so no one can see the pain.  No one should have to do this. No one should have to look into a lens and wonder how long that photo will outlive them. But here I am and somehow, taking control of that one small thing gave me back a little dignity in a disease that takes so much. This isnвАЩt giving up. This is love I have for myself, for my people, for the story I leave behind. #ALS #livingwithals  #obituaryphoto #thisisals #griefandhealing #alsawareness #alscaregiver #alsadvocate #alsawarenessmonth #alsadvocacy #viral

description: Korean BBQ Shotgun Shells рЯШЃвАНрЯТ® Recipe в§µпЄПв§µпЄПв§µпЄП Before we dive into the recipe, IвАЩve got to give a shoutout to @Bearmountain BBQ вАФIвАЩve been using their pellets for the past five years, and there is a reason I do! Their smoke pellets add incredible depth and flavor to everything I cook. For this one, IвАЩm using one of my NEW go-to blends: Old Fashioned Pellets! Shotgun Shell Ingredients: 1 Pack Manicotti (14 Shells) 1 Pack Bacon 1 lb Ground Beef 1 lb Ground Pork 1 Bunch Green Onions 1/4 Cup Canned Carrots 4 Tbsp Soy Sauce 1 Tbsp Sesame Oil 1 Tbsp Chili Oil 2 Tbsp Gochujang 2 Garlic Cloves 1 Tbsp Ginger 3 Tbsp BBQ Rub (Grilling with Dad-All Purpose) 4 Tbsp BBQ Sauce How to: 1. Add Ground Beef, Pork, Green Onions, Carrots, Soy Sauce, Sesame Oil, Chili Oil, Gochujang, Garlic, Ginger in a bowl and mix well 2. Add Mixture to a ziplock piping bag 3. Add mixture in Manicotti Shells and wrap with regular bacon (NOT THICK) 4. Refrigerate overnight or for 3-4 hours 5. Add your favorite BBQ rub  6. In the Smoker at 325 degrees for 45 min 7. Then add bbq sauce and let that set for 10-15 minutes or until bacon is cooked 8. Garnish with Spicy Korean Mayo, Green Onions, and Sesame Seeds Spicy Korean Mayo Ingredients: 1/2 Cup Mayo 2 Tbsp Gochujang 2 Tbsp Honey 1 Lemon How to вЮ°пЄП add ingredients in a bowl and whisk itвАЩs that easy рЯШЃвАНрЯТ® Smoker: @Weber Grills SearWood BBQ Rub: @Grillin With Dad  Knife: Bear Hands Cleaver @THE COOKING GUILD  Shirt: @Poncho  #korean #bbq #shotgun #shells #recipe

author: idespondent
description: Venice wasnвАЩt built on solid ground... It was built on millions of wooden logs driven deep into the seafloor. Since the year 421 A.D., this floating city has defied both time and engineering logic. While most cities stand on bedrock or concrete, Venice rises on a forest of waterlogged timber. Yes вАФ wood. Specifically, alder trees вАФ a type that doesnвАЩt rot underwater. When buried in clay and soaked in salty water, this wood doesnвАЩt decay вАФ it petrifies. Over centuries, it hardens, becoming nearly as tough as stone. A timeless wonder still holding up an entire city. St. MarkвАЩs Campanile rests on 100,000 wooden piles. The grand Basilica della Salute required over a million. Each pile was hammered in by hand, spaced every half meter, driven up to three meters deep into the seabed. But why build a city on water? In the early 5th century, Italy was under attack by barbarian tribes. Fleeing the invasions, people sought refuge in the muddy, marshy Venetian lagoon. The water was their wall вАФ a natural fortress that enemies couldnвАЩt cross easily.

author: mrrgolfballing
description: Kim Jong-ilвАЩs official biography claims that in his first and only round of golf, he shot 38 under par, including 11 holes-in-one. This incredible feat was reported by North Korean state media and took place on a Pyongyang golf course in 1994. While the story is widely known, golf authorities have expressed skepticism about the accuracy of such a low score, especially the 11 holes-in-one. The theory how that stat had entered into the official record was: The scorekeeper tracking KimвАЩs round that day had relied on a relative-to-par system, marking down 0 for pars, 1 for bogeys and 2 for double-bogeys. Unfamiliar with that scorekeeping shorthand, the North Korean state news agency covering the outing had read the 1s on KimвАЩs card as holes-in-one. Follow me for more!

description: OK, this is my side of the story. I attended the 2025 graduation at UC Berkeley and I was aware that they would be a protest, but I didnвАЩt think it would be right in front of me. so basically these group of graduates walked in and sat down, got ready and everything everything looked normal. As soon as the ceremony started, they started putting on their red glove to represent bloody hands and lifted it up in the air they also had their white shirt on. I couldnвАЩt read the writings or what it said because of where I was standing. I bet you as soon as they did that, I noticed extra security being posted right in front of them. I was honestly scared something might go down, but I loved how the students handled the situation peacefully. When a speech was being given by the keynote speaker iвАЩve forgot his name, they all got up so they could be seen properly and that when three security in gray shirts walked up the stands to tell them they have to either sit down or they had to leave. IвАЩm not sure what the security exactly said, but when they told them something, the students started walking out Chanting and people were cheering for them. author: jujumaoo
description: рЯЗ≤рЯЗљ Pozole Rojo | Soups So Good It Can Cure Any Sickness Ep. 3 INGREDIENTS: Pozole Rojo - 1 kg pork (ham hocks) - 1 kg pork shoulder - 5 red onions, chopped - 12 cloves garlic, minced - Enough pork stock to reach the top of the pot.  - Maiz blanco (hominy) - 200g chile guajillo/ancho, (deseeded and to taste) - 2 bay leaves Blending Mixtures: - 3 tbsp dried oregano - 1 tbsp cumin - 5-6 cloves of garlic - 1 red onion, roughly sliced  - Ladle your mixture inside the blender.  Toppings: - Corn tortilla - Cabbage, sliced  - Red radish, sliced  - Cilantro, chopped  - 1 lime INSTRUCTIONS: - Start by adding your ham hocks (pata cut) into a hot pot with oil. Let it sear for a few minutes before removing from the container. Then saute your garlic and onions until softened, and pour pork broth until it fills the pot and bring to a boil. - In the meantime, deseed chilis and add this into the mixture and season with salt and pepper. Let it simmer for an hour. - Place everything under вАЬblending mixtureвАЭ into a heat-safe blender. Blend until smooth and add it back into the pot. - Add additional sliced pork and ham hocks to the mixture, along with hominy and a bayleaf to season. Let it simmer to allow the pork to cook for about 20-30 minutes. Serve with toppings and sides and enjoy! #cookingasmr #asmr

author: fnd_warriors
description: We were out for lunch at Texas RoadhouseвАФa simple outing, like so many others. But for those living with FND, thereвАЩs no such thing as вАЬsimple.вАЭ Marci had just stepped out of the truck and taken a few steps toward the restaurant. I looked back and immediately noticed something wasnвАЩt rightвАФshe wasnвАЩt responding. As I walked over to her, her legs buckled beneath her. I stepped in, caught her, and helped guide her safely to a nearby bench before she could fall. Others around us asked if we needed helpвАФand I truly appreciated their concern. I let them know we had it under control. This is part of our life with Functional Neurological Disorder. Episodes like these are unpredictable. They happen without warning. But with care, awareness, and support, we keep moving forward. We share these moments not for sympathyвАФbut to help others understand what life with FND really looks like. рЯТЩ #fyp #fypгВЈ  #FNDJourney #PNES #CaregiverStrong #InvisibleIllnessAwareness #AwarenessMatters #FunctionalNeurologicalDisorder #SeizureAwareness #PNESAwareness #DisabilityAwareness #ChronicIllnessWarrior #ChronicIllnessSupport #ChronicIllnessLife #InvisibleIllnessCommunity #RareDiseaseAwareness #CaregiverSupport #CaregiverLife #LoveAndStrength #ThisIsFND #UnseenStruggles #AwarenessIsKey #NeurologicalDisorder #SpoonieLife  #FightFND #RealLifeWithFND #NotJustInMyHead  #LifeWithFND #SupportNotStigma #StrongForHer #friday

description: I went to the pool during summer 2023.  he was lifeguarding.  I forgot my swim suit at home so we ran to buy one at walmart!! i was wearing boys 8вАУ10 boxers рЯШ≠ and a tiny bikini top. we go back to the pool and start swimming inside, then we go to the pool outside and thatвАЩs when i saw him on stand lifeguarding! i told my sister he was super fricken cute.  my sister and her friend ALSO thought he was cute until he got off stand to go to the guard houseвА¶ and they said he was too short for them lol! they are both over 5вАЩ7!! So, my little sister over hears all this and decided to swim over to him once he got back on stand. and proceeded to tell him i thought he was cuteвА¶ рЯШ≠  i naturally got out of the pool and started running to my mom and telling her what my little sister did. then i went to swim inside and here comes all my sisters and they swim inside with me. then HE comes in and starts working the slide. my sisters are talking to him about me and then they yell from the top of the slide telling me he wants to talk to me and to come up the slide. so i refuse a bunch until he looks at me and tells me to come up. also i was 14 at the time. he was 15.  i walk up the slide nervous and shaking and we are talking and i go down the slide EMBARRASSING. рЯЩИ And he tells me he will give me his number after his shift! so i go change and go back into the indoor pool, he isnвАЩt in thereвА¶ so i go outside and heвАЩs there, GETS OFF STAND. AND I PUT MY NUMBER IN HIS PHONE. рЯЂҐ i thought for sure he wouldnвАЩt want me. i thought i put my number in his phone and he wouldnвАЩt text. but then about 10-15 mins later, im in the locker room and he texts me вАЬheyвАЭ hehehe! and i get so happy. we start talking and for awhile we didnвАЩt even know each others names. so we shared them. he went first and said his name was вАЬbasicвАЭ his name is josh! like dude. i donвАЩt know abt yall but idk many joshвАЩs. but anyways, he asks for mine and i tell him вАЬscarlettвАЭ he said it was beautiful. i was telling my sisters and mom about this all while it was happening and i think they got a little annoyed рЯШВ we talked for about a month then he never OFFICALLY EVER asked me to be his girlfriend but the day i know we both claimed each other was september 2nd 2023 while i was up north and so was he! iвАЩve gotta say. itвАЩs been almost 2 years and im still madly in love with him. we have had our amazing times and our TERRIBLE times. and i mean terrible. but at the end of the day i love him so much. and im so happy to call him mine. im so happy i found him.  i love you moo bug!!!! #fyp #ilovemybf #godisgood #country #america #fypage #foryoupage

author: _cointel
description: We Made The Zoot Suit of the Decade. For the past few months, weвАЩve been building something special. Spike Lee wanted to channel вАЬShortyвАЭ, his iconic character from Malcolm X and reintroduce him to the world, this time with the wisdom, vision, and fire of 2025. We took that challenge personally. What followed was a journey through sketches, fittings, setbacks, breakthroughs, and above all craftsmanship. Every inch of this suit was drafted from scratch. We custom dyed grosgrain for each stripe, hand-cut every panel, sourced gold buttons to echo Harlem Renaissance elegance, and built the silhouette from a muslin draft to final fitting. It wasnвАЩt just a suit. It was a resurrection. A cultural blueprint. A modern revival of the unapologetic flair of 1940s zoot suits, reimagined through a contemporary Black lens. And we believe, we made the zoot suit of the decade. This was made with no factory. Just vision, grit, and trust. Design and creative direction by COINTEL. Thank you, Spike, for trusting us to dress the moment. This is only the beginning. #COINTEL #ZootSuitOfTheDecade #SpikeLee #Cannes2025

author: 444.linaa
description: Hello, my name is Alina Valenzuela and in febuary 2025 I fell sick with the flu.. I am doing much better and made a full recovery but I thought I should should take a moment to share my story. On February 4th, 2025 I began to feel pains in my chest and wasnвАЩt sure why. My mom rushed me to the ER as the pains got worse and worse. No one could figure out what was so they kept me for several days to do testing. Little by little the doctors finally figured out what was going on and later decided to transfer me to a bigger hospital. As they were getting ready to transfer me I went into cardiac arrest which was the scariest thing for my family and friends. After they got me stable they where able to transfer me as quickly as possible to Texas childrenвАЩs hospital in Houston Texas. After many many surgeries and being in a coma for 2 weeks I finally started to wake up. A few weeks later I was transferred to a rehab unit and made a full recovery! My overall goal was to walk again to be able to walk the stage at graduation! Two men, including one later identified as a doctor, could be seen attempting to revive de Jesus before paramedics were called. author: teenmomfansfb
description: Amber Portwood's Terse Response to an Honest Text from Daughter Leah Shocks Teen Mom Cast and Fans - At Gary's home, Leah explains to him and Kristina that she wants to send Amber a text that clarifies where they stand. "I have a text ready that I want to send to Amber and get it over with," Leah tells them. In a confessional, she explains, "Obviously, for the past few years, I've been feeling a certain way. But the last straw was when she was doing her lives online. To say what she said...she was even talking about me some. I, personally, can't handle it." - The text says... "This isn't mean to hurt you but I want to let you know that all these years it's been my decision to not have a relationship with you and nobody has influenced my decision. I feel like recent online activities have put me in a place where I need to communicate this to put a boundary between us for myself," Leah reads. She tells Kristina, "I just wanted to keep it short and not go off or anything, because I feel like that's just kind of immature." Leah acknowledges she's "scared," but sends the message. In a confessional, Leah says, "I would say I have a hard time forgiving and forgetting and stuff like that. The best way for me to forgive her would be me moving on, but I'm really glad that I made my own move to actually push forward for myself and what I want, so I just hope that she's finding a way to accept it." - Cameras catch up with Amber later as she receives it. "Why is Leah messaging me?" she asks the producer she's working with. Amber reads the message and explains it to the producer, taking a minute to process before beginning to go off about Gary. "And then you have this other piece of s---, nasty man, this is the s--- that [I] get from my daughter that I love so much and I can't even give her it?" Amber began. "I can't take her out on little dates like I did with my son. I couldn't take her out to go shopping, I couldn't take her out to f--king eat alone," she continued. "Gary said I had to go over there, you nasty prick." Then, she addressed her daughter. "And Leah? Stop. You're 16. Stop!" She looked right into the camera before continuing, saying, "People see the disrespect, by the way, and they tell me how much you disrespect me too, stop!" "You're rude. There's no reason to be rude. You do not know what you are saying right now," she continued. "You're young, be young. Be 16. Be 16 and do not be in the middle of me and your father!" - Several Teen Mom castmates reacted to the intense scene. Mackenzie Douthit answered an Instagram Q&A question on the moment by writing, "I'm not gonna lie, I stopped and said a prayer that Leah would never see that." On her Snapchat, Cheyenne Floyd Davis posted the scene with mind-blown emojis, while Jade Cline made mention of it in her episode recap. "The way she looked into that camera and started basically going off on her own child that is saying, 'Hey, it's me. I'm the one making this choice because you're doing things that are, they're hurting me and I'm a 16 year old and I'm having a hard time processing and dealing with it,'" she began. Jade says Amber maintains a "victim mentality" and says, "It's okay to be accountable and make mistakes." "I think that's what kids look for, is someone to apologize and say they f---ed up and then actively start doing things to show, 'Hey, I'm being better, I'm trying to be better. I'm doing things differently for you.' I think that's essentially what Leah has been looking for and hasn't been getting it and she's over it." Leah Messer was asked about it on her Instagram Live and said, "I think when it comes to thatвА¶ it's none of my business. I don't want to get into other people's family dynamics and their challenges. But I just really feel like, no matter what the children, the kids, they have to be put first, and I couldn't imagine вАФ we just got to set ourselves aside and make it less about you and most about the children involved," she shared. #TeenMom #teenmomthenextchapter

author: philipdefranco
description: TrumpвАЩs Tariffs Are Working And HeвАЩs Really Mad At Walmart #usa #america  Trump is now blaming Walmart for rising prices in response to the tariffs. He says that they should eat the cost of the tariffs and not raise prices on customers. This tweet from Trump reveals what many suspected, Trump doesnвАЩt understand how his tariffs are supposed to work. If prices donвАЩt rise in response to tariffs then they donвАЩt deliver any protection. The tariffs only work because the prices go up. The tariffs are supposed to make Chinese goods more expensive than American goods. ThatвАЩs the whole point. If Walmart eats the prices on the tariffs, then thereвАЩs no incentive for consumers to choose the American-made version of products, if it even exists, because they are at a base line more expensive. TrumpвАЩs policy is working exactly how itвАЩs intended to and he doesnвАЩt like it. Trump also claimed that countries pay the tariffs, not consumers - which obviously judging by Walmart raising their prices is not true. Oh a more zoomed out level - Trump also said that the tariffs are there to replace the income tax and make us rich but that they are also there to increase manufacturing, it canвАЩt be both. If you import less goods because youвАЩre producing more domestically, the less tax revenue youвАЩre getting and the less вАЬrichвАЭ youвАЩre becoming. This is like basic Econ 101 stuff.

author: teenmomfansfb
description: Teen MomвАЩs Tyler Baltierra and Catelynn Lowell Vow Not to Mention Carly or Her Parents Anymore вАҐ Tyler Baltierra¬†and¬†Catelynn LowellCatelynn LowellвАЩs latest update on daughter Carly has led to some new perspectives. On the Thursday, May 22, episode of¬†Teen Mom: The Next Chapter, Dr.¬†Drew Pinsky¬†had a virtual meeting with the couple to recall a private conversation he had with CarlyвАЩs adoptive parents,¬†Brandon¬†and¬†Teresa Davis. вАЬI can tell you what was expressed to me about Carly,вАЭ he shared on the MTV reality showвАЩs season finale. вАЬBrandon said she is thriving and she has friends and sheвАЩs athletic and musical and sheвАЩs doing all these wonderful things.вАЭ Catelynn tried to hold back tears as she wondered why Dr. Drew was sharing the update and not CarlyвАЩs adoptive parents. вАЬWell thanks for keeping that beautiful girl away from me,вАЭ she said while getting visibly emotional. Dr. Drew replied, вАЬI donвАЩt think thatвАЩs the intent. I understand thatвАЩs how it feels. I know you. I know how tough this is. I get it.вАЭ вАЬIn terms of being unblocked and a visit, I donвАЩt see that not happening, frankly,вАЭ Dr. Drew shared. вАЬYou got to go through the baby steps. But you are encouraged to send gifts on Christmas, birthdays and when gifts are completely appropriate.вАЭ While Tyler expressed his belief that itвАЩs вАЬweirdвАЭ to be getting this information from someone other than Brandon and Teresa, Dr. Drew explained that no situation is perfect. вАҐ вАЬWhat Teresa kept saying is she absolutely wants what you want and wants to maintain a relationship, but she feels like she needs a reset and for everybody to calm down and let all the negativity [settle],вАЭ he said. вАЬ[Carly] sings in church. SheвАЩs quite an accomplished singer and they recorded a song of hers. I would love to listen with you because itвАЩs so moving. It does feel like Carly is sending a message of, вАШIвАЩm good.вАЩ Do you guys want to hear it?вАЭ Citing her mental health, Catelynn said she wanted to listen in private. According to MTV, when she asked for the link to hear the performance, Brandon and Teresa denied the request. вАҐ In a joint statement on social media, both Carly and Tyler promised to not speak about Carly, Brandon and Teresa publicly moving forward. вАЬBirthparents are always at the mercy of the adopters (which is understandable since weвАЩre the ones who relinquished our baby to them) but that still doesnвАЩt make it any less hard or painful,вАЭ Tyler and Catelynn wrote via Instagram on Thursday. вАЬAs IвАЩve stated before, we wonвАЩt be mentioning our biological daughter or her parents anymore & thatвАЩs why weвАЩre actually relieved that this episode is airing, so that way we can all just finally move forward.вАЭ вАЬWe are incredibly sorry if anything we have said about our truth as birthparents has hurt you or Carly or negatively impacted your life. That was never our intention,вАЭ the pair said in a letter to Brandon and Teresa. вАЬWeвАЩre the adults here & itвАЩs our job to put everything aside for the best interest of Carly. Which requires open, honest & transparent communication. So we hope moving forward, you will participate in that requirement.вАЭ #teenmom #teenmomthenextchapter #teenmomfansfb #mtv #realitytv #fyp #teenager #usweekly #adoption #adoptionstory #openadoption #closedadpption #nocontact #instagram #message

author: motherprimal
description: Before the rib, there was the clay. And from that same clay, Adam and Lilith were formed вАФ equal. Elemental. Earth-born. But when Lilith would not lay beneath him, when she claimed her voice, her pleasure, her power вАФ she was cast out, not for sinвА¶ but for sovereignty. This is not just mythology. This is memory. Lilith is not a demon. She is the first woman to say no. The first to walk away when the divine masculine forgot how to revere the divine feminine. The first to name herself. Banished from Eden, she did not crumble. She transformed. She became the night wind. The whisper in the trees. The fire in the womb. They feared her because she could not be controlled. They called her wicked because she remembered her worth. They wrote her out вАФ but she never truly left. Lilith is the energy that rises when we choose ourselves. When we refuse to shrink. When we wake from the spell of silence and say: вАЬI remember who I am.вАЭ To all who have been told they are too much, too wild, too angry, too sensual, too loud: Lilith walks with you. This is not the end of her story. It is the beginning of her reclamation If sheвАЩs been showing up in your dreams, your rituals, or your rage вАФ this may be your Lilith initiation. Drop a black heart if you feel her rising. #lilith #goddess #mythology #fyp #darkfeminine
